inputs.label: Load Mass
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the object to be lifted

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Safety margin to ensure reliable lifting (e.g., 1.5 for general lifting)

inputs.label: Number of Lifting Points
inputs.businessContext: Number of ropes, chains, or hydraulic cylinders sharing the load

inputs.label: Angle from Vertical
inputs.businessContext: Angle of the lifting sling from vertical; 0° means straight vertical lift

inputs.label: Dynamic Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to account for acceleration and deceleration forces during lifting

inputs.label: Gravity
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity; standard Earth gravity is 9.81 m/s²
